name: skill-installer
install_hint: Codex system skill. If absent, update/reinstall Codex or install from openai/skills .system only when explicitly needed.

name: skill-creator
install_hint: Codex system skill. If absent, update/reinstall Codex.

name: imagegen
install_hint: Codex system skill. If absent, the UI image generation workflow is unavailable.

name: openai-docs
install_hint: Codex system skill. If absent, use official OpenAI docs manually as fallback.

name: github plugin skills
install_hint: Install/enable the GitHub Codex plugin when PR review, CI fix, or GitHub comment workflows are needed.
